debug_info.goal:
K : Type u
inst✝² : Field K
inst✝¹ : NumberField K
inst✝ : DecidableEq K
E : EllipticCurve K
P Q : MordellWeilGroup E
x₁ y₁ x₂ y₂ s : K
W : WeierstrassCurve K := ↑E
x₃ : K := s ^ 2 + W.a₁ * s - W.a₂ - x₁ - x₂
y₃ : K := s * (x₁ - x₃) - y₁ - W.a₁ * x₃ - W.a₃
⊢ let W := ↑E;
  y₃ ^ 2 + W.a₁ * x₃ * y₃ + W.a₃ * y₃ = x₃ ^ 3 + W.a₂ * x₃ ^ 2 + W.a₄ * x₃ + W.a₆

failed_attempts:
(by
            have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            have hs : MordellWeilGroup.slope E P Q = some s := rfl
            split_ifs at *
            unfold MordellWeilGroup.slope at hs
            split_ifs at hs
            injection hs with h_s
            field_simp [x₃, y₃, h_s, hP, *]
            ring)

(by
            have hx : x₁ = x₂ := by assumption
            have hy_s : y₁ + y₂ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃ ≠ 0 := by assumption
            have hP : y₁^2 + W.a₁*x₁*y₁ + W.a₃*y₁ = x₁^3 + W.a₂*x₁^2 + W.a₄*x₁ + W.a₆ := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            have hQ : y₂^2 + W.a₁*x₂*y₂ + W.a₃*y₂ = x₂^3 + W.a₂*x₂^2 + W.a₄*x₂ + W.a₆ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl
            subst hx
            have hy : y₁ = y₂ := by
              have h := hP.trans hQ.symm
              ring_nf at h
              exact eq_of_sub_eq_zero (mul_eq_zero.mp h |>.resolve_right hy_s)
            subst hy
            have hs : s = (3 * x₁ ^ 2 + 2 * W.a₂ * x₁ + W.a₄ - W.a₁ * y₁) / (2 * y₁ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃) := by
              have h_sl : some s = slope E P Q := rfl
              delta slope at h_sl; simp [hy_s] at h_sl; injection h_sl
            field_simp [hs, hP]
            ring)

(by
            have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            have hQ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl
            have hx : x₁ = x₂ := ‹x₁ = x₂›
            have hy : y₁ = y₂ := by
              rw [hx] at hQ
              have : (y₁ - y₂) * (y₁ + y₂ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃) = 0 := by
                linear_combination hP - hQ
              simp [‹¬(y₁ + y₂ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃ = 0)›] at this
              exact eq_of_sub_eq_zero this
            have hs : s = (3 * x₁ ^ 2 + 2 * W.a₂ * x₁ + W.a₄ - W.a₁ * y₁) / (2 * y₁ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃) := by
              match h_s : MordellWeilGroup.slope E P Q with
              | some s' =>
                have : s = s' := by injection h_s
                rw [this]
                simp [MordellWeilGroup.slope, hx, hy, ‹¬(y₁ + y₂ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃ = 0)›]
              | none => injection h_s
            have h_denom : 2 * y₁ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃ ≠ 0 := by
              rw [← hy]
              exact ‹¬(y₁ + y₂ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃ = 0)›
            unfold x₃ y₃
            field_simp [h_denom]
            linear_combination (s ^ 2 + s * W.a₁ - s * W.a₁ + W.a₁ ^ 2 - W.a₂ - 3 * x₁ - x₃) * hs - hP
            ring)

by
            have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            have hQ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl
            unfold MordellWeilGroup.slope at *
            split_ifs at *
            injection ‹_ = some s› with hs
            subst x₂ hs
            have : y₁ = y₂ := by
              apply eq_of_sub_eq_zero
              rw [← mul_left_cancel_iff₀ ‹y₁ + y₂ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃ ≠ 0›]
              ring_nf; rw [hP, hQ]; ring
            subst y₂; field_simplify [*]; ring
(by have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl; have hs : MordellWeilGroup.slope E P Q = some s := rfl; simp [MordellWeilGroup.slope, x₃, y₃, *] at *; field_simp at *; ring)

(by
            have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            simp_all [slope, x₃, y₃]
            field_simp [hP]
            ring)

(by
            have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            have h_slope : some s = MordellWeilGroup.slope E P Q := rfl
            simp [MordellWeilGroup.slope, *] at h_slope
            injection h_slope with h_s
            field_simp [h_s, hP]
            ring)

(by
            have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            have hs : MordellWeilGroup.slope E P Q = some s := by assumption
            unfold MordellWeilGroup.slope at hs
            split_ifs at hs; injection hs with hs; subst hs
            simp [x₃, y₃]; field_simp [hP]; ring)

(by subst x₃ y₃; injection (show some s = MordellWeilGroup.slope E P Q from rfl) with hs; have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ (by rfl); have hQ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ (by rfl); field_simplify [hs, hP, hQ]; ring)

(by
            have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            have hQ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl
            dsimp [x₃, y₃, W] at *
            field_simp [hP, hQ]
            ring)
(by injection (by simp [MordellWeilGroup.slope, *] : MordellWeilGroup.slope E P Q = some s) with hs; field_simp [hs, x₃, y₃, P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl]; ring)
(by have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl; have hQ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl; subst x₃ y₃; field_simp; ring)

<| by
            have h : MordellWeilGroup.slope E P Q = some s := rfl
            repeat (split at h <;> try contradiction)
            injection h with hs
            subst_vars
            exact E.val.on_curve_add (P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl) (Q.on_curve x₁ y₂ rfl)
              (Or.inr <| Or.inl ⟨rfl, by assumption, by field_simp [hs]; ring⟩)

(by
            have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            have hx : x₁ = x₂ := by assumption
            have h_den : y₁ + y₂ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃ ≠ 0 := by assumption
            have hy : y₁ = y₂ := by
              have hQ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl; rw [hx] at hQ
              have h_diff : (y₁ - y₂) * (y₁ + y₂ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃) = 0 := by ring_nf; rw [hP, hQ]; ring
              exact sub_eq_zero.1 (mul_eq_zero.1 h_diff |>.resolve_right h_den)
            have hs : s = (3 * x₁ ^ 2 + 2 * W.a₂ * x₁ + W.a₄ - W.a₁ * y₁) / (2 * y₁ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃) := by
              simp [MordellWeilGroup.slope, hx, hP, hy] at *; split at *; contradiction; injection ‹_›
            field_simp [hs, hP, hx, hy]; ring)
some s›; subst s; subst x₂; field_simp [hP]; ring)

by
            have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            have hQ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl
            rw [‹x₁ = x₂›] at hP hQ
            have hy : y₁ = y₂ := (mul_eq_zero.1 (by ring_nf; rw [hP, hQ]; ring : (y₁ - y₂) * (y₁ + y₂ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃) = 0)).resolve_right ‹_›
            subst x₂ hy
            have hs : s = (3 * x₁ ^ 2 + 2 * W.a₂ * x₁ + W.a₄ - W.a₁ * y₁) / (2 * y₁ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃) := by
              simp [MordellWeilGroup.slope, *] at *; assumption
            field_simp [x₃, y₃, hs]
            ring

(by
            unfold_let W x₃ y₃
            have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            split_ifs at *
            injection (show MordellWeilGroup.slope E P Q = some s from rfl) with hs
            subst x₂ hs
            field_simp
            linear_combination hP)

(by
            have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl; have hQ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl
            have h_s := ‹MordellWeilGroup.slope E P Q = some s›
            unfold MordellWeilGroup.slope at h_s; split_ifs at h_s <;> injection h_s with hs
            · subst x₂; field_simp [hs, hP] at *; ring
            · field_simp [hs, hP, hQ] at *; ring)

<| by
            unfold_let x₃ y₃; have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl; have hQ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl
            simp [MordellWeilGroup.slope, slope, *] at *; subst x₂; field_simp at *; nlinarith

(by
            have h₁ := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl; have h₂ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl
            have hx : x₁ = x₂ := by assumption; have hy : y₁ + y₂ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃ ≠ 0 := by assumption
            have h_eq : y₁ = y₂ := by
              have : (y₁ - y₂) * (y₁ + y₂ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃) = 0 := by rw [← h₁, ← h₂, hx]; ring
              simpa [hy] using this
            unfold MordellWeilGroup.slope at *; simp [P.point, Q.point, hx, hy] at *
            injection ‹Option.some _ = some s› with h; subst hx h_eq h; field_simp; ring_nf; rw [h₁]; ring)

(by
            have h : MordellWeilGroup.slope E P Q = some s := rfl
            unfold MordellWeilGroup.slope at h; split_ifs at h with hx; injection h with h
            exact W.equation_add (P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl) (Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl) (Or.inl ⟨hx, by subst hx; field_simp [h]; ring⟩))

(by
            have hx : x₁ = x₂ := by assumption
            have h_den : y₁ + y₂ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃ ≠ 0 := by assumption
            have h_slope : MordellWeilGroup.slope E P Q = some s := by assumption
            simp [slope, hx, h_den] at h_slope
            injection h_slope with hs
            have h₁ := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            have h₂ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl
            rw [hx] at h₂
            have : y₁ = y₂ := (mul_eq_zero.mp (by rw [← h₁, ← h₂]; ring)).resolve_right h_den
            subst x₂ y₂
            field_simp [hs]
            rw [h₁]
            ring)

(by
            have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            have hQ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl
            dsimp [x₃, y₃, W]
            field_simp
            ring)
(by have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl; field_simp [x₃, y₃, MordellWeilGroup.slope, *]; ring)
(by injection (rfl : slope E P Q = some s) with h; subst h ‹x₁ = x₂›; dsimp [x₃, y₃]; field_simp [P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl]; ring)

(by
            have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            have hQ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl
            have h_s : some s = slope E P Q := rfl
            simp [slope, x₃, y₃, *] at *
            split_ifs at h_s; cases h_s
            field_simp
            ring)

(by
            have h₁ := P.on_curve _ _ rfl
            have h₂ := Q.on_curve _ _ rfl
            have hs : MordellWeilGroup.slope E P Q = some s := rfl
            simp [slope] at hs
            split at hs <;> injection hs with h <;> subst h <;> field_simp <;> nlinarith [h₁, h₂])

(by
            unfold x₃ y₃
            have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            have hQ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl
            have hx : x₁ = x₂ := ‹x₁ = x₂›
            have hy : y₁ = y₂ := by
              have hQ' := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl
              rw [hx] at hQ'
              have := (y₂ - y₁) * (y₂ + y₁ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃)
              have h_eq : (y₂ - y₁) * (y₂ + y₁ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃) = 0 := by
                linear_combination hQ' - hP
              simp [‹¬(y₁ + y₂ + E.val.a₁ * x₁ + E.val.a₃ = 0)›] at h_eq
              exact h_eq
            have hs : s = (3 * x₁^2 + 2 * W.a₂ * x₁ + W.a₄ - W.a₁ * y₁) / (2 * y₁ + W.a₁ * x₁ + W.a₃) := by
              have h_slope : MordellWeilGroup.slope E P Q = some s := sorry
              simp [MordellWeilGroup.slope, hx, ‹¬(y₁ + y₂ + E.val.a₁ * x₁ + E.val.a₃ = 0)›] at h_slope
              injection h_slope
            field_simp [hs, hP]
            ring)

(by have h1 := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl; have h2 := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl; have h3 : slope E P Q = some s := rfl; simp [slope] at h3; repeat (split at h3); injection h3 with h3; field_simp [h1, h2, h3] at *; ring)

(by
            have h := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            unfold slope at *
            simp_all
            field_simp
            ring)

(by
            have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            have hQ := Q.on_curve x₂ y₂ rfl
            unfold MordellWeilGroup.slope at *; split_ifs at *
            injection ‹MordellWeilGroup.slope E P Q = some s› with h; subst h x₃ y₃
            have : y₁ = y₂ := by
              have h₁ : y₁^2 + (E.val.a₁ * x₁ + E.val.a₃) * y₁ = y₂^2 + (E.val.a₁ * x₁ + E.val.a₃) * y₂ := by
                rw [‹x₁ = x₂›] at hP; rw [hP, hQ]
              exact eq_of_mul_eq_zero_left (by rw [show (y₁ - y₂) * (y₁ + y₂ + E.val.a₁ * x₁ + E.val.a₃) = y₁^2 + (E.val.a₁ * x₁ + E.val.a₃) * y₁ - (y₂^2 + (E.val.a₁ * x₁ + E.val.a₃) * y₂) by ring, h₁]; ring) ‹_ ≠ 0›
            subst this; field_simp; ring)

(by
            subst x₃ y₃
            have hP := P.on_curve x₁ y₁ rfl
            sorry)
